name: LLM-Driven Earnings and Filings Alpha
description: Large language models (GPT-4o, Claude, Llama) read earnings call transcripts, 10-K/10-Q filings, and analyst reports. They generate structured sentiment scores, risk flag counts, and management tone assessments. The resulting alpha signal predicts post-earnings price drift.
core_logic: LLM_score = model.analyze(earnings_transcript). Signal = f(sentiment_score, surprise_magnitude, guidance_tone). Post-earnings drift: stocks with positive LLM score + positive price reaction drift upward 3-10 days.

risk.main_risk: LLM hallucinations; API costs; regulatory NDA concerns

cons: API costs at scale ($0.01-0.10 per transcript)
signal_buy: LLM sentiment > 0.3 AND price gap > 0 on earnings day
signal_sell: LLM sentiment < -0.3 AND price gap < 0 on earnings day
